takes.chevron and iraq seek to bypass strait o: Pipeline bypass weakens Hormuz’s chokehold, bearish for prices long-term.
takes.chevron will explore creating strait of: Exploring alternatives signals reduced dependency on Hormuz, bearish sentiment.
takes.iran war live updates u s and iran escal: Escalation hints lift war premium, but oversupply limits price reaction.
takes.chevron to sign oil investment accords w: Investment accords signal stable Iraq output, bearish for prices near-term.
